title: Along with the Gods: The Last 49 Days
posterAlt: Along with the Gods: The Last 49 Days (2018) movie poster
tmdbOverview: As the deceased soul Ja-hong and his three afterlife guardians prepare for their remaining trials for reincarnation, the guardians soon come face to face with the truth of their tragic time on Earth 1,000 years earlier.
synopsis: Along with the Gods: The Last 49 Days is a 2018 action, adventure and fantasy film from South Korea. It holds a solid 7.1 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a 18A certification (CA rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
